generated_exposure.exposure_text: As we get older, we remember what it was like when we didn't have the strong security measures we have today. The 2020s showed us how quickly things can change. We can't afford to go back to those uncertain times. Our law enforcement needs the tools to act decisively when threats emerge. The current expansion of domestic security powers isn't about controlling people - it's about protecting them. Remember how quickly the Boston Marathon bombers were identified and caught? That kind of coordination saves lives. We can't let activists weaken our security just because they don't like how it makes them feel. Safety comes first.
